clearlagg:book_pages.title: Admin — Kontrol World
clearlagg:book_pages.author: ClearLagg Admin
pages:
Perintah OP di buku:
- set time day/night
- clear inventory player
- ban/kick (dgn durasi)
- spawn, teleport, dsb

Contoh manual: Gunakan command berikut (via chat):
!ban <player> <detik>
!kick <player>
!invclear <player>
CATATAN: Buku Admin diberikan hanya ke OP/Host. Untuk set OP via tag: beri tag clearlagg_op
